properties.name: studio.features.textract.enabled
properties.description: Whether Studio textract auto-configuration is enabled.

properties.name: studio.textract.max-extract-size
properties.description: Maximum file size accepted for text extraction. Plain numbers are bytes; K, KB, M, MB, G, GB, T, and TB suffixes are supported.

properties.name: studio.textract.tesseract.datapath
properties.description: Tesseract tessdata directory used by image OCR.

properties.name: studio.textract.tesseract.language
properties.description: Tesseract OCR language expression.

properties.name: studio.textract.pdf.engine
properties.description: PDF extraction engine selection. Supported values are auto, pdfbox, and pymupdf4llm.

properties.name: studio.textract.pdf.fallback-enabled
properties.description: Whether PDFBox fallback is allowed when PyMuPDF4LLM is selected and fails.

properties.name: studio.textract.pdf.engines.pdfbox.enabled
properties.description: Whether the PDFBox PDF extraction engine is enabled.

properties.name: studio.textract.pdf.engines.pymupdf4llm.enabled
properties.description: Whether the optional PyMuPDF4LLM worker PDF extraction engine is enabled.

properties.name: studio.textract.pdf.engines.pymupdf4llm.endpoint
properties.description: PyMuPDF4LLM worker POST /extract/pdf endpoint.

properties.name: studio.textract.pdf.engines.pymupdf4llm.timeout
properties.description: HTTP timeout for PyMuPDF4LLM worker calls.

properties.name: studio.textract.pdf.engines.pymupdf4llm.max-file-size
properties.description: Maximum PDF size sent to the PyMuPDF4LLM worker. Plain numbers are bytes; K, KB, M, MB, G, GB, T, and TB suffixes are supported.

properties.name: studio.textract.pdf.auto.prefer-pymupdf4llm-when.min-pages
properties.description: When engine=auto and the worker is enabled, prefer PyMuPDF4LLM for PDFs with at least this many pages.

properties.name: studio.textract.pdf.auto.prefer-pymupdf4llm-when.table-detection-required
properties.description: Reserved preference flag for request-level table extraction hints.

properties.name: studio.textract.pdf.auto.prefer-pymupdf4llm-when.ocr-required
properties.description: Reserved preference flag for request-level OCR hints.

properties.name: studio.textract.pdf.auto.prefer-pymupdf4llm-when.preserve-layout
properties.description: Reserved preference flag for request-level layout preservation hints.

properties.name: studio.features.text.enabled
properties.description: Legacy text extraction feature wiring toggle.

deprecation.reason: Textract feature wiring now uses the module name in the feature namespace.

properties.name: studio.text.max-extract-size
properties.description: Legacy text extraction size limit.

deprecation.reason: Textract runtime policy now uses the module name in the Studio runtime namespace.

properties.name: studio.text.tesseract.datapath
properties.description: Legacy Tesseract tessdata directory.

deprecation.reason: Textract runtime policy now uses the module name in the Studio runtime namespace.

properties.name: studio.text.tesseract.language
properties.description: Legacy Tesseract OCR language expression.

deprecation.reason: Textract runtime policy now uses the module name in the Studio runtime namespace.

properties.name: studio.features.text.max-extract-bytes
properties.description: Legacy text extraction size limit in bytes.

deprecation.reason: Text extraction size is a Studio runtime policy, not a feature wiring setting.

properties.name: studio.features.text.tesseract.datapath
properties.description: Legacy Tesseract tessdata directory.

deprecation.reason: Tesseract settings are Studio textract runtime policy, not feature wiring settings.

properties.name: studio.features.text.tesseract.language
properties.description: Legacy Tesseract OCR language expression.

deprecation.reason: Tesseract settings are Studio textract runtime policy, not feature wiring settings.
